---
title: "Talks"
---

## Oral presentations (presenter / first author)

- **European School of Hematology (ESH)** — Vienna, Austria — **Mar 2024** — *Oral presentation*  
  *Defining common genomic and transcriptomic profiles in Richter’s syndrome paves the way for drug repurposing strategies.*

- **NO-CANCER Congress** — Novara, Italy — **May 2024** — *Short talk*  
  *Defining common genomic and transcriptomic profiles in Richter’s syndrome paves the way for drug repurposing strategies.*

## Posters (first author)

- **ERIC** — Barcelona, Spain — **Sep 2024** — *Poster*  
  *Defining common genomic and transcriptomic profiles in Richter’s syndrome paves the way for drug repurposing strategies.*
